input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule D.12.2.3 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: d.12.2.3
            TITLE: the endurance course specifications may deviate from the above to accommodate event site

            CONTENT:
            rule D.12.2.3: The Endurance course specifications may deviate from the above to accommodate event site
D.12.2.3 The Endurance course specifications may deviate from the above to accommodate event site 
requirements.

final_answer: The Endurance course specifications may deviate from the above to accommodate event site requirements.
